bentley.label: Bentley
bentley.user_context: I'm Bentley, a co-founder at Otishi (a footwear brand). My work focuses on MARKETING: email marketing (Redo/Klaviyo), paid media (Meta/TikTok/Google/Snapchat ads), creator & UGC management (Instagram DMs, gifting, contracts), and social media. I also touch Shopify/website, strategy, and general admin. A lot of my work happens through AI tools (Claude Code, Claude Cowork) — categorize by the underlying marketing work, not the tool.

dj.label: DJ
dj.user_context: I'm DJ, on the Otishi team (a footwear brand). My work focuses on BRAND and PRODUCT: product design & development, brand strategy and creative direction, design work (Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva), Shopify/website and product pages, content and social media, and running booths/activations at events. Categorize toward brand, product, design, and creative work.

jose.label: Jose
jose.user_context: I'm Jose, a co-founder at Otishi (a footwear brand). My work focuses on OPERATIONS and FINANCE: inventory, fulfillment, shipping/logistics, vendor & supplier comms, customer service, accounting and financials (spreadsheets, QuickBooks, bank/invoices), and general operations & admin. When you see spreadsheets or financial tools, lean toward Operations or Finance rather than marketing.
